author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Vec4 PTX kernels for add and mul using ld.global.v4.f32 / st.global.v4.f32 (128-bit memory transactions). Each thread processes 4 floats. try_launch_binary_vec4 helper with automatic fallback to scalar kernel when n is not aligned or compilation fails. gpu_add and gpu_mul now try vec4 first when n >= 16 and n % 4 == 0. 810 core + 193 gpu tests pass.
